key_insight: PhononScore is a fast, phonon-aware scoring function that ranks crystal structures by dynamical stability without requiring explicit phonon calculations.
engineering_relevance: It provides a practical second-level screening tool for high-throughput materials discovery, allowing generated candidates to be reranked before costly DFT phonon analysis.
method: Trained on a multi-fidelity dataset of 157,463 crystal structures with phonon stability labels.
Predicts a unified stability score directly from crystal structures.
Used as a feedback signal for crystal generation, active learning, and reinforcement learning.
evidence_signal: On PhononBench, average dynamical stability rate improved from 30.7% to 83.7% across nine generator pools, with Top-10 candidates reaching 97.5%; PhononScore-DFT achieved 93.0% Top-100 stability on a high-fidelity DFT-PBE benchmark.
watch_item: Performance may depend on dataset coverage and transfer to chemistries or structure types not well represented in the training set.
paper_title: PhononScore: a phonon-aware scoring function for dynamical stability
